scores.correctness_notes: Core API usage is correct: observing collect_app_status/collect_unit_status, calling event.add_status(), priority order is right. However, the gold standard explicitly notes it is an error to call add_status() with ErrorStatus or UnknownStatus — the agent omits this important restriction. The claim that 'framework defaults to ActiveStatus if no add_status call' is plausible but not confirmed by gold standard.
scores.hallucination_notes: self.model.relations.get('db') uses a dict-style .get() on RelationMapping which may not be a valid method; the standard pattern is self.model.relations['db']. Minor issue. Otherwise no significant hallucinations.
